subject.pose: Standing upright with the 'Vel' in the right hand, left hand on hip (Shakti Vel pose)

iconography.mount_symbolism: Peacock feather tucked into the hair or a peacock in the background
iconography.vibhuti: Three horizontal sacred ash lines on forehead with a red kumkum bindu

jewelry.description: Layered gold necklaces and a rudraksha mala

environment.setting: Traditional temple backdrop or lush green hills (Palani hills style)
environment.lighting: Warm, ethereal glow with soft rim lighting
environment.atmospheric_effects: Subtle incense smoke and marigold flower petals at the feet
